calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT
Off Calendar May-22-2015 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Accepting Resignation Of Trustee And For Appointment Of Successor Trustee.
Off Calendar Apr-07-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The following matters were heard together: PTR-14-298018 The Jonathan Lesh Trust and PTR-14-298019 The Rebecca Lesh Trust.
Appearances: Katherine Jeffrey for Michael Delagnes.

The court stated that there is no issue regarding the appointment of a Guardian ad Litem as the minors are over the age of 14 and that their nominations can be accepted. Ms. Jeffrey confirmed that both trustor's are over the age of 14, that both have nominated the maternal aunt as trustee and that accounting petitions are before the court in June. The court stated that bond in the amount of $567,000.00 is required for the Jonathan Lesh trust, and bond in the amount of $498,000.00 is required for the Rebecca Lesh trust. The Court granted the petition for order accepting resignation of trustee and for appointment of successor trustee (in both cases) (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
